title: agathosma squamosa
intro: Agathosma squamosa, also known as the 'Round Leaved Barwood', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Agathosma squamosa include its ability to treat digestive issues, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as an antifungal and antibacterial agent. Agathosma squamosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
